name_en: 🆕 【Top Quality Replica】 M82538 Short Wallet 👏👏 This Multiple wallet combines Monogram Macassar canvas with Saffron orange calfskin trim, creating a classic aesthetic with a contemporary touch. The Multiple wallet features eight card slots and a bill compartment, easily fitting into most pockets. Dimensions: 11.5 x 9 x 1.5 cm
